items.title: American Express Is Spiking Higher -- Here's Why
items.author: Matt Frankel
items.description: The stock market is rallying due to tamer-than-expected inflation data and strong bank earnings. Several big banks reported better-than-expected results for the fourth quarter, and the lower inflation increases the likelihood of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in 2025, which could be a catalyst for higher bank profits.

items.title: Stocks Rise On Core Inflation Slowdown, Banks Rally After Strong Q4 Earnings, Treasury Yields Plummet
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: Stocks rallied as December inflation data showed underlying price pressures slowing, reducing fears of a prolonged pause in interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. Major banks reported strong Q4 earnings, boosting the financial sector.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Surges Past Q4 Forecasts
items.author: Jesterai
items.description: Goldman Sachs reported strong Q4 2024 earnings, with EPS of $11.95 surpassing the expected $8.21. The company's net revenue and return on equity also improved year-over-year, reflecting its effective management across business segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Goldman Sachs reported better-than-expected Q4 2024 earnings, with EPS, net revenue, and return on equity all improving significantly year-over-year. This indicates the company's strong performance and effective management across its investment banking, securities, and investment management segments.

items.title: US Stocks To Open Higher Ahead Of December Inflation Data: All Eyes On Banking Stocks As JPMorgan, Goldman, Citi, Wells Fargo Report Quarterly Earnings
items.author: Rishabh Mishra
items.description: US stock futures are trading higher ahead of the release of December inflation data. Investors are closely watching the banking sector as major banks like JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, and Wells Fargo report their quarterly earnings.
